lineage.Process: ExportFeatures Pacific_Missing_Inflows_SCHISM C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\PacNextGenInflows\PacNextGenInflows.gdb\Pacific_Missing_Inflows_SCHISM_unint # NOT_USE_ALIAS "flag "flag" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_Missing_Inflows_SCHISM,flag,0,254" #

ExportFeatures Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\PacNextGenInflows\PacNextGenInflows.gdb\Pac_SCHISM_InflowsOutflows # NOT_USE_ALIAS "id "id" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,id,-1,-1;vpuID "vpuID" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,vpuID,0,254;domain "domain" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,domain,0,254;START_X "START_X" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,START_X,-1,-1;START_Y "START_Y" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,START_Y,-1,-1;END_X "END_X" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,END_X,-1,-1;END_Y "END_Y" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,END_Y,-1,-1;start_DomL "start_DomL" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,start_DomL,0,254;end_DomLoc "end_DomLoc" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,end_DomLoc,0,254;FlowDir "FlowDir" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,FlowDir,-1,-1;multInt "multInt" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,multInt,-1,-1;long "long" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,long,-1,-1;lat "lat" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,lat,-1,-1;hl_link "hl_link" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,hl_link,0,254;comment "comment" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_SCHISMfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,comment,0,254" #
JoinField Pac_SCHISM_InflowsOutflows hl_link conus_nextgen_hydrolocations hl_link poi_id "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField Pac_SCHISM_InflowsOutflows poi_id conus_nextgen_pois poi_id id;nex_id "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField Pac_SCHISM_InflowsOutflows id conus_nextgen_flowpaths id START_X;START_Y;END_X;END_Y;order "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField Pac_SCHISM_InflowsOutflows id conus_nextgen_flowpath_attributes link TopWdth;TopWdthCC "Select transfer fields" #

ExportTable Pac_SCHISM_InflowsOutflows C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Downloads\InflowsOutflows\Pac\Pac_SCHISM_InflowsOutflows.csv # NOT_USE_ALIAS "vpuID "vpuID" true true false 254 Text 0
